headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Constellation Brands (STZ) Launching High-ABV Modelo Chelada Suprema Nationwide
summary: Constellation Brands recently launched Modelo Chelada Suprema nationwide, introducing its first high-ABV Modelo chelada at 8% ABV in 24-ounce cans and two blended fruit flavors. This move highlights how Constellation Brands is leaning into younger consumers’ interest in higher-proof, internationally inspired ready-to-drink options while building on Modelo Chelada’s leading RTD Michelada position. We’ll now examine how this higher-ABV Modelo Chelada Suprema launch could influence...
